title: SIBD-63 Seed Record Schema
description: Each line in SIBD-63.jsonl encodes a single A-level cross-domain structural isomorphism discovery.

pipeline.description: Which of the three independent pipelines surfaced this isomorphism.

rank_in_pipeline.description: Rank assigned by the pipeline's own scoring (lower = higher rank).

a_name.description: Natural-language name of the first phenomenon.

a_domain.description: Domain label of phenomenon A (may be empty for v1 records).

b_name.description: Natural-language name of the second phenomenon.

b_domain.description: Domain label of phenomenon B (may be empty for v1 records).

shared_equation.description: Compact statement of the shared mathematical structure (v3 only).

variable_mapping.description: Mapping of variables between A and B (v3 only; may be stringified JSON).

equations.description: All equations associated with the pair from any pipeline.

isomorphism_depth.description: Depth score 1-5, 5 = structure matches at multiple independent layers.

isomorphism_confidence.description: Calibrated confidence in [0,1] that the isomorphism is real-not-coincidental.

practical_value.description: Why the finding matters beyond academic novelty.

risk.description: Why the isomorphism might not survive empirical test.

blocking_mechanisms.description: Specific obstacles the user should plan for.

execution_plan.description: Step-by-step plan for the seeded empirical paper.

solo_feasible.description: Whether a single researcher can realistically complete the paper.

one_line_verdict.description: One-line characterization, written by the deep-analysis LLM.

rating.description: All records in SIBD-63 are A-grade by construction.

transformation_primitives.description: V4 cross-domain transformation primitives used (if labeled).

transformation_depth.description: How deep a structural transformation is required to map A to B.

is_deep.description: True if more than surface-level isomorphism.
